query:
SELECT ap.id as pdiId, ap.alunoId, ap.trilhaId, t.name as trilhaNome, a.name as alunoNome
FROM assessment_pdi ap
LEFT JOIN trilhas t ON t.id = ap.trilhaId
LEFT JOIN alunos a ON a.id = ap.alunoId
WHERE ap.alunoId = 30080;

SELECT DISTINCT sp.competenciaName, sp.progressoTotal
FROM student_performance sp
WHERE sp.alunoId = 30080
ORDER BY sp.competenciaName;

LEFT JOIN alunos a ON a.id = ap.alunoId
